verse.text: Commit your way to the LORD; trust in him and he will do this.
verse.ref: Psalm 37:5 — Day 12 of 31, from 21 Bible/📖 Daily Verse Rotation

intention.note: Before each of today's 12 DMs, know why you're sending it — if the reason doesn't trace to the mission, don't send it.

rehc_btc.title: 🏇 REHC & BTC — 2026 Works (source: Extreme Pro)

P4 + P5 + P6 — all 12 touches batched (6 Prisy connects + Sibiraj + 6 GC), phone away, templates open
Mark done, tell Claude what moved (vault write-back), confirm tomorrow's P1. (Sunday — no Sat production / Wed stats block today)
